entities.description: As a subsection of '3电气特性', this section outlines the operational environmental conditions required for the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, including temperature, humidity, and other relevant factors.
Refers to the environmental conditions under which the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board is designed to operate, as detailed in section 3.1.

relations.description: The concept of '工作环境' is a primary topic of section 3.1.
